title: Operational Tempo Control
summary: Managing the pace of operations to maintain advantage.
details: Tempo is the rate of operations. High tempo: constant pressure prevents enemy recovery, but exhausts your forces. Low tempo: allows recovery, but gives enemy same opportunity. Control tempo to your advantage - accelerate when winning, pause when needing recovery. Faster tempo than enemy enables initiative. Sudden tempo changes surprise enemy. Match tempo to sustainable crew and ship capacity.
annotations: Tempo advantage wins campaigns, not just battles.
Exhausted forces make mistakes - manage fatigue.
